Description: Freeze consistency replica routing and operational SLO contracts before implementation.
AcceptanceCriteria: Phase 3 contracts and non-goals are documented and approved.

Description: Implement shard role model and write path pinned to primary nodes.
AcceptanceCriteria: Write path validates primary-only ingestion and role metadata.

Description: Add gateway read routing policy to use replicas with primary fallback.
AcceptanceCriteria: Replica-aware query routing works and fallback behavior is validated.

Description: Implement health checks and failover selection policy for read routing.
AcceptanceCriteria: Unhealthy replicas are excluded and failover works in integration tests.

Description: Define and test read-after-write expectations under primary plus replica topology.
AcceptanceCriteria: Consistency contract tests pass and docs are updated.

Description: Add distributed load tests and soak scenarios for sustained operation.
AcceptanceCriteria: Load and soak reports generated with latency and error metrics.

Description: Expose key metrics and provide dashboard definitions for shard and gateway health.
AcceptanceCriteria: Dashboard spec and metrics coverage satisfy runbook requirements.

Description: Create alert thresholds escalation guide and operator runbooks for common incidents.
AcceptanceCriteria: Runbooks and alert docs reviewed and actionable.

Description: Define rollout gates canary checks and rollback steps for distributed deployment.
AcceptanceCriteria: Release checklist and rollback playbook are complete.

Description: Create final acceptance suite combining HA performance and failure scenarios.
AcceptanceCriteria: Acceptance suite passes and signoff criteria are met.
